deviceInventory.note: What I own, what it cost, and when the warranty runs out. Done it once so I am not guessing next time something dies.

device.name: Samsung Galaxy A54
device.usage: Banking app, OurFamilyWizard, the assistant, photos of Chloe.

device.name: Apple iPhone SE
device.usage: Dispatch and job email only. Stays on the work account.

device.name: TCL 50 inch 4K
device.usage: Cardinals and Diamondbacks, one episode before bed.

device.name: Honeywell digital, non smart

purchase.from: O'Reilly was out, got it at Walmart

device.usage: Kept it dumb on purpose. I set the schedule myself.

device.name: Front door camera
device.usage: Watches the porch. Motion alerts to the personal phone.

device.name: Tacoma factory display
device.serial: in 2021 Tacoma SR5, plate AZ CFT-4471
device.usage: Bluetooth for the Tucson drive playlists. Backup camera.

network.router: landlord installed, I added the camera and TV
network.connected: phone, work phone, TV, camera, thermostat is wifi but I leave it local
network.note: No smart speakers. No tablet. Keep it simple.

summary.notes: Most everything is out of warranty. Replace on failure, not on schedule.
